name: oopsla-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for OOPSLA papers published as PACMPL Issue OOPSLA: choosing a submission round, the two-round Accept/Minor-Revision/Major-Revision/Reject pipeline, revision strategy, artifact badges, SIGPLAN empirical standards, and SPLASH presentation. Grounded in the OOPSLA 2026 CFP and PACMPL sources checked on 2026-07-08.
